topicSettings.title: Topic Settings
topicSettings.description: Adjust the model, sampling, prompt, and advanced parameters for this topic.
topicSettings.generationSectionDescription: Applies only to this topic. Fields without an override use the global defaults.
topicSettings.modelDescription: Leave empty to use the global default model.
topicSettings.temperatureDescription: Higher temperature makes responses more diverse; lower keeps them steadier.
topicSettings.topPDescription: Limits the sampling candidate pool and is usually tuned together with temperature.
topicSettings.maxTokensDescription: Limits the maximum output length for a single reply.
topicSettings.maxTokensInvalid: Max tokens must be an integer greater than or equal to 1.
topicSettings.reasoningBudgetInvalid: Reasoning budget must be an integer greater than or equal to 1.
topicSettings.contextLengthDescription: Controls how many history messages are included when sending from this topic.
topicSettings.reasoningBudgetDescription: Only applies to providers that support budget-style thinking. Leave blank to use the provider default.
topicSettings.openrouterReasoningOffDescription: Off: stop using the OpenRouter reasoning form configuration.
topicSettings.openrouterReasoningNoneDescription: Explicitly disable: sends reasoning.effort = none so OpenRouter disables reasoning on purpose.
topicSettings.openrouterReasoningExcludeDescription: When enabled, only the final answer is kept and reasoning tokens are excluded from the response.
topicSettings.openrouterReasoningMaxTokensDescription: Optional: cap the token budget used by OpenRouter reasoning. Leave blank to unset it.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchNoConfigDescription: The current model's built-in search has no configurable parameters.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchOpenAiDescription: Applies only to the OpenAI Responses web_search tool. Empty fields use provider defaults.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchAnthropicDescription: Applies only to the Anthropic Messages web_search_20260209 tool. Empty fields use provider defaults.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchXaiDescription: Applies only to the xAI Responses web_search tool. Empty fields use provider defaults.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchOpenRouterDescription: Applies only to the OpenRouter openrouter:web_search server tool. Empty fields use provider defaults.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchExternalProviderActive: This assistant uses an external search provider. Sending will prefer external search, so these built-in search parameters will not be injected for this turn.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchDomainsPlaceholder: Type a domain and press Enter
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchDomainConflict: Domains cannot appear in both lists: {{domains}}
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchExternalAccessDescription: When off, the provider may use only cached or indexed results.
topicSettings.nativeWebSearchImageUnderstandingDescrip: Allow the search tool to understand images in search results.
topicSettings.modelParamsDescription: Common fields such as temperature/top_p/max_tokens/seed/stop are mapped to generic call settings; remaining fields are passed through into the current provider contract's native providerOptions namespace.
topicSettings.modelParamsInvalid: Invalid JSON. Only object values are supported.
topicSettings.promptSectionDescription: Applies only to this topic. The assistant system prompt remains in the assistant editor.
